name: rivotek
chineseName: 润芯微科技（江苏）有限公司
tagline: Intelligent Base for Full-Scene Smart Fusion
description: Rivotek is a leading Chinese semiconductor company founded in July 2020, headquartered in Suzhou, China. The company focuses on intelligent base solutions through "Chip + OS + AI" technology stack, providing high-performance, autonomous, and controllable intelligent experiences for global customers.
longDescription: Rivotek Technology (Jiangsu) Co., Ltd., established in July 2020 and headquartered in Suzhou Xiangcheng High-Speed Rail New City, is a solution provider specializing in full-scene intelligent fusion through domestic intelligent base technology. Based on the "Chip + OS + AI" intelligent base, Rivotek provides global customers with high cost-performance, autonomous and controllable full-domain interconnected intelligent experiences. The company has established ecological collaboration with leading domestic enterprises including Xiaomi, vivo, DJI, SAIC, and Voyah, achieving large-scale breakthroughs in mobile, AI intelligent hardware, automotive, and embodied intelligence fields. Rivotek implements the "1+4+N" strategy: "1" intelligent base covering Zhixin Computing Platform, Zhiwei AIOS, and Zhirun AI Model; "4" major terminals serving mobile phones, AI intelligent hardware, vehicles, and embodied intelligence; "N" intelligent scenarios empowering travel, home, industry, and health.

seoTitle: Rivotek Distributor | Intelligent Base & AIoT Solutions | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized Rivotek distributor offering intelligent computing platforms, AIOS, AI hardware solutions, and automotive intelligent systems. Technical support available.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Rivotek products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of Rivotek (Rivotek Technology Jiangsu Co., Ltd.). As an authorized partner, we provide genuine Rivotek products with full technical support, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain services. We have direct access to Rivotek's engineering resources and can support your design-in requirements from concept to production. Our partnership covers Rivotek's complete intelligent base portfolio including computing platforms, AIOS, AI hardware solutions, and automotive intelligent systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Purchase Rivotek products from LiTong with confidence knowing you are getting genuine components with full warranty and technical support.

faqs.question: What is Rivotek's "1+4+N" strategy?
faqs.answer: Rivotek's "1+4+N" strategy defines their comprehensive intelligent ecosystem approach: "1" represents the intelligent base comprising three core components - Zhixin Computing Platform (high-performance processors), Zhiwei AIOS (full-stack operating system), and Zhirun AI Model (artificial intelligence algorithms). "4" represents the four major terminal categories served: mobile devices, AI intelligent hardware, automotive systems, and embodied intelligence (robotics). "N" represents the numerous intelligent scenarios empowered including smart travel, smart home, industrial intelligence, and health applications. This strategy enables Rivotek to provide end-to-end solutions from底层hardware to upper-layer applications, creating a complete intelligent ecosystem for customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team to understand how Rivotek's 1+4+N strategy can benefit your specific application.

faqs.question: What makes Rivotek different from other AIoT solution providers?
faqs.answer: Rivotek differentiates itself through several key advantages: (1) Full-stack capability - unique integration of chip hardware, operating system software, and AI algorithms in one solution; (2) Domestic intelligent base - autonomous and controllable technology stack reducing supply chain risks; (3) Rapid innovation - founded in 2020 but already collaborating with industry leaders like Xiaomi, vivo, DJI, SAIC, and Voyah; (4) Cross-domain expertise - simultaneous strength in mobile, automotive, robotics, and industrial applications; (5) Cost-performance leadership - delivering high-performance solutions at competitive prices; (6) Local support - strong technical support presence in China with fast response times. Rivotek's "Chip + OS + AI" approach provides customers with turnkey intelligent solutions rather than just individual components.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Rivotek for full-stack intelligent solutions with strong local support and competitive pricing.

faqs.question: Does Rivotek offer automotive-grade products and solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rivotek offers comprehensive automotive intelligent solutions including smart cockpit systems, intelligent driving platforms, domain controllers, and in-vehicle intelligent devices. Their automotive portfolio features IATF 16949 quality management certification and ISO 26262 functional safety compliance. Key automotive products include: (1) Smart cockpit solutions integrating multi-screen display, voice interaction, and intelligent connectivity; (2) Intelligent driving platforms with advanced perception and decision-making capabilities; (3) Domain controllers for centralized vehicle computing; (4) In-vehicle intelligent devices for enhanced user experience. Rivotek has established partnerships with major automotive OEMs including SAIC and Voyah, demonstrating their capability to meet automotive industry requirements for quality, reliability, and safety.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for Rivotek automotive solution selection and technical documentation.

faqs.question: What applications are Rivotek products best suited for?
faqs.answer: Rivotek products are optimized for intelligent applications requiring high-performance computing and AI processing: (1) Mobile & Consumer - smartphones, tablets, wearables requiring intelligent features and long battery life; (2) AI Intelligent Hardware - edge AI devices, smart cameras, IoT gateways needing on-device AI inference; (3) Automotive Electronics - smart cockpits, ADAS, domain controllers for next-generation vehicles; (4) Embodied Intelligence - robotics, autonomous systems requiring advanced perception and decision-making; (5) Industrial IoT - smart manufacturing, industrial automation, Industry 4.0 applications. Rivotek's intelligent base architecture provides the computational power, software stack, and AI capabilities needed for these demanding applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Share your application requirements with LiTong FAE team for personalized Rivotek solution recommendations.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Rivotek products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Rivotek products including: (1) Product selection guidance - helping you choose the right Rivotek computing platforms and solutions for your application; (2) Application engineering - supporting hardware design, software integration, and system optimization; (3) Reference designs - providing proven design examples and evaluation platforms; (4) Software development support - assisting with AIOS integration, driver development, and application optimization; (5) Failure analysis - investigating any quality issues or field failures; (6) Long-term supply - ensuring stable supply for production programs. Our FAE team has expertise in embedded systems, AI applications, and automotive electronics to help you successfully implement Rivotek solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team for comprehensive technical support on Rivotek products.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Rivotek products?
faqs.answer: Rivotek product lead times vary by product type and order volume: (1) Standard computing platforms - typically 6-8 weeks for common configurations; (2) Custom solutions - 8-12 weeks depending on specific requirements; (3) High-volume orders - may require 8-10 weeks depending on capacity; (4) New product introductions - first samples may take 10-14 weeks for initial production. LiTong maintains strategic inventory for high-demand Rivotek products to support urgent requirements. For critical projects, we recommend forecasting and buffer stock arrangements. Contact LiTong sales for specific lead time information and scheduling.
faqs.decisionGuide: Standard products 6-8 weeks, custom solutions 8-12 weeks. Contact LiTong sales for specific lead times.
